summary: P2 refactor verified: SubmitChallengeModal extracted to /app/frontend/src/components/SubmitChallengeModal.jsx as pure controlled component {isOpen,onClose,onSubmit,themeColor} with NO internal fetch. Parent (ChallengeDetailModal inside Challenges.jsx) owns showSubmit state and performs POST /api/challenges/{id}/submissions via handleSubmitChallenge passed as onSubmit prop. All 10 acceptance criteria pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Contract correctly enforced: SubmitChallengeModal.jsx receives only {isOpen,onClose,onSubmit,themeColor}. Grep confirms zero 'fetch'/'/api/' usages inside the modal file. Form, file→base64 conversion, palette hex parsing, submitting state and resetForm() remain as presentation/UI concerns; POST is owned by the parent via onSubmit(payload). Matches the requested dumb-component separation.

ChallengeDetailModal.handleSubmitChallenge (Challenges.jsx:295-317) calls fetch(`${API_BASE}/api/challenges/${challengeId}/submissions`) with Authorization Bearer from localStorage, throws on !res.ok (so child can toast the message), prepends created submission to detail.submissions, closes modal via setShowSubmit(false) and toasts success — correct.
Auth gating works: handleOpenSubmit (Challenges.jsx:286-293) checks isAuthenticated and navigates to /login with toast — verified via UI redirect.
No leftover embedded SubmitModal in Challenges.jsx (grep for 'function SubmitModal'/'const SubmitModal' returns empty).
Regression OK: vote endpoint POST /api/challenges/{id}/submissions/{subId}/vote still fires from the submission card and votes counter updates.
test_credentials: teste@lindart.app / Teste#2026 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Token stored at localStorage 'lindart.auth.token'. Onboarding bypass: lindart.onboarding.v1.completed=1, lindart.tour.v1.seen=1.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 challenge submission via UI in challenge '1771b5871c8b' (Oceano Mineral): caption=TEST_p2_refactor submission, palette=[#1b3a4b,#f4f1ea], image=1x1 PNG base64. Initial submissions=4 → final=5. Also incremented votes on first submission via challenge-vote-* regression check.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 refactor verified end-to-end. Network listener captured: 0 POSTs on close-X and Cancel-without-submit; 0 POSTs when submitting without image (toast 'Imagem é obrigatória' shown, modal stays open); exactly 1 POST /api/challenges/1771b5871c8b/submissions (status 200) when submitting with valid image — call originated from PARENT (Challenges.jsx > ChallengeDetailModal > handleSubmitChallenge), confirming child has no internal fetch. After success: modal closed (data-testid challenge-submit-modal removed from DOM), submission appended to gallery (count 4→5), toast 'Peça enviada! Boa sorte ✦' shown. Unauth flow: clicking challenge-open-submit while logged out redirected to /login with toast. Vote regression: POST /api/challenges/{id}/submissions/{subId}/vote still works. To reproduce: login via /api/auth/login, write access_token to localStorage 'lindart.auth.token', set onboarding flags, navigate /challenges, wait ~2.5s for AuthContext rehydrate, click first challenge-card-*, then challenge-open-submit.
